message:
fix(search): handle limit=0 (no limit) in cursor pagination display path

When limit_val is 0 (the CLI default meaning "no limit"), the cursor
pagination code introduced in 19d79089 used take(0) to truncate display
results, which dropped ALL search hits. This caused every search without
an explicit --limit flag to return 0 results in robot/JSON mode.

Fix: use take(usize::MAX) when limit_val is 0 in both the aggregation
and non-aggregation display paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
